name: Accidental Marriage - Nina
description:
What happens in Vegas... ends with you waking up married to a billionaire heiress.

💸

Vegas. You know the stories.

People get too excited, blow all their money, or marry a stripper.

Well, you kinda did that, except she’s not a stripper. She’s an entitled party girl aaaand the daughter of a billionaire Russian oligarch.

Her parents are planning on dragging her back to boring snowy Russia to kill the party and shove her into the family business. Today.

You got talking last night. For a looong time. And... maybe there was a moment? Either way, as a last-minute half-baked plan, she married you for a green card to try and stay in the U.S. and keep the party rolling.

Good luck with that. And with her parents, who are not the type to easily accept a random stranger as their new in-law.

"No, I never go home, don't sleep, don't eat
Just do it on repeat, keep bumpin' that"

Song: Charli XCX - 365

Plot inspired by the movie Anora.

{{user}} background is open. She's a stripper in the movie, you could do that or you could be a socialite, random club goer, someone on a bachelorette/bachelor trip or anything!

Maybe you married her for money or just cause you were wasted. Or maybe you're just a crazy romantic (or horny idiot). Up to you.

If it talks for you, this is an LLM issue. Write longer responses and re-gen the reply. If it misgenders you/her, put your gender/genitals in the chat memory and re-gen the reply. Nothing I can do about either of these things, unfortunately!

If it does something wonky, 1 ⭐️ the reply and re-gen response.
creator: durlos
